## What's Changed

- Added a Tube TV enable toggle in server configuration.
- Renamed the configuration section from Tube TV Mode to Tube TV.
- Exposed Tube TV as a server-owned top-level The Tube catalog item before Stream and Local.
- Hid Tube TV from players when it is disabled or when Local Media is not configured.
- Gated Tube TV guide planning and channel streaming behind the same server-side enable/configuration checks.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, local media folders, commercial library, cache, and hardware device mappings.
